# opnsense_unbound_domain_override (Resource)
Manages an Unbound DNS domain override (forwarding rule) on OPNsense.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_unbound_domain_override" "corp" {
  domain = "corp.example.com"
  server = "10.0.0.53"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain to override (e.g., `example.com`).
- `server` (String) IP address of the DNS server to forward queries to.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the domain override.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this domain override is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the domain override in OPNsense.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_unbound_domain_override.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
